name: rad-1password
description: End-to-end 1Password CLI (op) coverage — secret references (op://...), `op inject`/`op run`/`op read` for keeping secrets out of code and shell history, item CRUD with assignment statements and JSON templates, vault and user provisioning with granular permissions, SSH key generation and use, third-party CLI auth via `op plugin run`, and service-account / Connect-server patterns for CI/CD and headless servers. 1 router skill, 6 topical sub-skills, 4 slash commands. Cross-checked against op v2.34.0 --help.
